588 TRCHOSTM_DSCHRG_CD TRCHOSTM_DSCHRG_CD Therapies: Tracheostomy Care (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was receiving tracheostomy care. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
